name: Herbed Breakfast Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease 12 muffin cups with 1 tablespoon margarine. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. Stir in chopped herbs.
3. In another bowl, whisk together remaining ingredients until combined. Pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture and stir just until moistened; do not overmix. The batter will be lumpy.
4. Fill each muffin cup 2/3 full with batter. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
